parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        7 AS dias
),

periodos AS (
    SELECT
        'atual' periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias-1 DAY) inicio,
        data_fim fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias*2)-1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros
),

ads AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim,

        CASE
            WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%CAPTURA%' THEN 'CAPTURA'
            ELSE 'DISTRIBUICAO'
        END campanha,

        ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) investimento,
        SUM(a.impressions) impressoes,
        SUM(a.reach) alcance,
        SUM(a.link_click) cliques,
        SUM(a.landing_page_view) landing_page_view,
        SUM(a.post_reaction) post_engagement,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.link_click) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
            2
        ) ctr,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.spend) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
            2
        ) cpc

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.Data) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo,
        campanha
),

contatos AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        COUNT(*) contatos

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.ttconversa_criada t
        ON DATE(t.data_da_primeira_mensagem)
           BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    WHERE t.origem='Meta Ads'

    GROUP BY p.periodo
)

SELECT

    a.periodo,
    a.campanha,

    a.inicio,
    a.fim,

    a.investimento,
    a.impressoes,
    a.alcance,
    a.cliques,
    a.landing_page_view,
    a.post_engagement,
    a.ctr,
    a.cpc,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN c.contatos
    END contatos,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            c.contatos /
            NULLIF(a.cliques,0) * 100,
            2
        )
    END conversao_funil_pct,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            a.investimento /
            NULLIF(c.contatos,0),
            2
        )
    END custo_por_contato

FROM ads a

LEFT JOIN contatos c
    ON c.periodo = a.periodo

ORDER BY
    a.periodo,
    a.campanha;

WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,

),

periodos AS (

        'anterior',

)

SELECT

    p.periodo,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%[VASO] [VENDAS]%' THEN 'VASO'
        WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%[PED] [VENDAS]%' THEN 'PED'
        WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%[ORQ] [VENDAS]%' THEN 'ORQ'
        WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%' THEN 'DISTRIBUICAO'
        ELSE 'OUTROS'
    END AS campanha,

    p.inicio,
    p.fim,

    ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) AS investimento,

    SUM(a.impressions) AS impressoes,

    SUM(a.reach) AS alcance,

    SUM(a.clicks_all) AS clicks_all,

    SUM(a.link_click) AS cliques,

    SUM(a.landing_page_view) AS visitas_pagina,

    SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all) AS checkouts,

    SUM(a.purchase_all) AS vendas_trafego,

    SUM(a.purchase_value) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.link_click) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.landing_page_view) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.landing_page_view),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.purchase_all) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.initiate_checkout_all),0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.spend) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.purchase_all),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.purchase_value) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.spend),0),
        2
    ) AS roas,

    ROUND(
        SUM(a.spend) /
        NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
        2
    ) AS cpc

FROM periodos p

JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
    ON DATE(a.Data) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

GROUP BY

    p.periodo,

    campanha,

    p.inicio,

    p.fim

ORDER BY

    campanha,

    FIELD(p.periodo,'atual','anterior');

parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        7 AS dias
),

periodos AS (
    SELECT
        'atual' periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias-1 DAY) inicio,
        data_fim fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias*2)-1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros
),

ads AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim,

        CASE
            WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%CAPTURA%' THEN 'CAPTURA'
            ELSE 'DISTRIBUICAO'
        END campanha,

        ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) investimento,
        SUM(a.impressions) impressoes,
        SUM(a.reach) alcance,
        SUM(a.link_click) cliques,
        SUM(a.landing_page_view) landing_page_view,
        SUM(a.post_reaction) post_engagement,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.link_click) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
            2
        ) ctr,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.spend) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
            2
        ) cpc

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.Data) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo,
        campanha
),

contatos AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        COUNT(*) contatos

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.ttconversa_criada t
        ON DATE(t.data_da_primeira_mensagem)
           BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    WHERE t.origem='Meta Ads'

    GROUP BY p.periodo
)

SELECT

    a.periodo,
    a.campanha,

    a.inicio,
    a.fim,

    a.investimento,
    a.impressoes,
    a.alcance,
    a.cliques,
    a.landing_page_view,
    a.post_engagement,
    a.ctr,
    a.cpc,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN c.contatos
    END contatos,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            c.contatos /
            NULLIF(a.cliques,0) * 100,
            2
        )
    END conversao_funil_pct,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            a.investimento /
            NULLIF(c.contatos,0),
            2
        )
    END custo_por_contato

FROM ads a

LEFT JOIN contatos c
    ON c.periodo = a.periodo

ORDER BY
    a.periodo,
    a.campanha;

parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        7 AS dias
),

periodos AS (
    SELECT
        'atual' periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias-1 DAY) inicio,
        data_fim fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias*2)-1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros
),

ads AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim,

        CASE
            WHEN a.campaign_name LIKE '%CAPTURA%' THEN 'CAPTURA'
            ELSE 'DISTRIBUICAO'
        END campanha,

        ROUND(SUM(a.spend),2) investimento,
        SUM(a.impressions) impressoes,
        SUM(a.reach) alcance,
        SUM(a.link_click) cliques,
        SUM(a.landing_page_view) landing_page_view,
        SUM(a.post_reaction) post_engagement,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.link_click) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
            2
        ) ctr,

        ROUND(
            SUM(a.spend) /
            NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
            2
        ) cpc

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.Data) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo,
        campanha
),

contatos AS (
    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        COUNT(*) contatos

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.ttconversa_criada t
        ON DATE(t.data_da_primeira_mensagem)
           BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim

    WHERE t.origem='Meta Ads'

    GROUP BY p.periodo
)

SELECT

    a.periodo,
    a.campanha,

    a.inicio,
    a.fim,

    a.investimento,
    a.impressoes,
    a.alcance,
    a.cliques,
    a.landing_page_view,
    a.post_engagement,
    a.ctr,
    a.cpc,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN c.contatos
    END contatos,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            c.contatos /
            NULLIF(a.cliques,0) * 100,
            2
        )
    END conversao_funil_pct,

    CASE
        WHEN a.campanha='CAPTURA'
        THEN ROUND(
            a.investimento /
            NULLIF(c.contatos,0),
            2
        )
    END custo_por_contato

FROM ads a

LEFT JOIN contatos c
    ON c.periodo = a.periodo

ORDER BY
    a.periodo,
    a.campanha;

    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,

        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,

    ROUND(

        2

        2
